channel.title: NUZU News
channel.description: NUZU: Real News in Real Time. Breaking headlines from 200+ trusted sources.

item.title: Olivia Rodrigo Steps Out With Singer Cameron Winter in Los Angeles - E! News

Toxic money: Swalwell and Gonzales sent now-unwanted thousands to other campaigns - OpenSecrets

VIEW China's first-quarter growth beats forecast despite Iran war risks - Reuters

Iran crisis shoves Europe’s economic woes off summit agenda - politico.eu
India, Germany agree to deepen cooperation in defence, other key areas - Asia News Network
China's GDP growth accelerates to 5% despite Iran war - Nikkei Asia

A security researcher has released a tool that can extract data from Windows 11's 'Recall' feature, which uses AI to trace the entire history of the system, stating, 'A safe is sturdy, but a delivery truck is not.' - GIGAZINE
Thailand central bank cuts 2026 growth, says no limits to worst-case scenarios if war continues - Bangkok Post
Excitement and surprise as Philadelphia prepares for the World Cup - Yahoo Sports

#TSRFashion: Who doesn’t love a good fashion duo?! #Doechii thanked her stylist #SamWoolf for his support and creative direction with her looks during the Los Angeles Fashion Awards.😍 📸:@gettyimages✍🏾:#TSRStaffJR - instagram.com
